---
title: "ISSS608-VAA"
---

::: {.text-center style="padding: 60px 20px; color: white;"}
**Welcome to Nemo’s Journey**

Nemo’s journey is not just a swim through the sea, but a voyage through the vast architecture of new ideas. Challenge accepted. Danger embraced. Wisdom sought in the sapphire silence of the deep.

**Welcome to ISSS608: Visual Analytics and Application.** Within this digital reef, you will find my coursework - a collection of insights and data stories gathered from the currents of exploration.

![](images/family.png){width="614"}

P/S:...
:::
